---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: 'OOH Session #122...<br>[NCAA]{.ncaa} [tournament]{.ncaa2}<br>{{< iconify mdi:bracket style="color:#000000;" >}}[brackets]{.ncaa2}{{< iconify mdi:bracket style="color:#000000;" flip="horizontal" >}} {{< iconify emojione:basketball >}}'
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/bb.png 
#  data-background-opacity: ".4"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://clipart-library.com/2023/2742709.png #https://freepngimg.com/save/19432-basketball-png/1359x1245  #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {layout="[[10,10],]"}
::: first-column
+ Recap session #121
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[NCAA]{.ncaa} [tournament]{.ncaa2}<br>{{< iconify mdi:bracket style="color:#ffffff;" >}}[brackets]{.ncaa2}{{< iconify mdi:bracket style="color:#ffffff;" flip="horizontal" >}} {{< iconify emojione:basketball >}}](https://github.com/elishayer/mRchmadness)
+ Shared problem-solving

:::

::: second-column

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 185px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/3_17_26">
  <img src="/img/title121.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#121: 

![](https://pngimg.com/d/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="50" top="200"}

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dmi3kno/polite/master/data-raw/sticker.png){.absolute width="150" top="245" right="90"}

## [{{< iconify noto:package >}}`package`{{< iconify fluent-emoji-flat:package >}}<br>{{< iconify noto:no-entry >}}[citations!!]{.dancing}{{< iconify noto:no-entry >}}](https://yihui.org/rmarkdown-cookbook/write-bib#write-bib)

::: {.panel-tabset}

### `knitr::`

::: {.columns .smaller}

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}

1. `write_bib()` creates .bib file (will overwrite existing)

2. `.packages()` is a hidden function that will include all loaded packages within the .bib

:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

````{r}
---
format: html
bibliography: packages.bib  #<1>
---

```{r}
knitr::write_bib(c(.packages(), 
      "ggplot2"), "packages.bib")  #<2>

```

````
1. should match name YOU provide (line #8 here)
2. `.packages()`, any non--loaded packages you want to include, & your .bib filename


:::

:::

![](https://www.gavinrozzi.com/images/portfolio/r-packages/zipcoder-logo.webp){.absolute height="150" left="-150" top="150"}
 
![](https://www.jumpingrivers.com/blog/spring-clean-r-package-usethis/sticker.png){.absolute left="-130" bottom="150" height="180"}

### `papaja::`

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

1. use [`cite_r()`](https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/papaja/versions/0.1.4/topics/cite_r) for auto--population of in--text citations:

```{r}
We used `r cite_r("packages.bib")`

```

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

:::

:::

![](../../../img/intextcites.JPG){.absolute right="-120" bottom="160"}

![](https://www.john-fox.ca/Companion/car-hex.png){.absolute height="200" right="-60" bottom="0"}

![](https://64.media.tumblr.com/844d8b61c57c75d76a64fb21bbf6404e/ca3137f2bed7e0d8-13/s540x810/de4b379700e74d3159f693a7ddc87bb407e016a7.png){.absolute height="150" left="-150" top="150"}

![](https://www.atorusresearch.com/wp-content/uploads/timber-885x1024.png){.absolute left="-130" bottom="150" height="180"}

### Other options

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="47%"}

### [`grateful`](https://pakillo.github.io/grateful/)

+ option for printed [table]{.underline} with a listing of [package name, version, & in--text citation](https://pakillo.github.io/grateful/#frequently-asked-questions)

:::

::: {.column width="48%"}

### [`pakret`](https://arnaudgallou.github.io/pakret/)

+ [appends]{.underline} package spex to first `.bib` specified in [YAML]{.ranchers2} `bibliography:` field

:::

:::

![](https://www.tidymodels.org/images/parsnip.png){.absolute height="150" left="-150" top="150"}

![](https://www.tidymodels.org/images/recipes.png){.absolute left="-130" bottom="150" height="180"}

![](https://www.tesselle.org/images/packages/alkahest.png){.absolute right="-140" bottom="40" height="200"}

:::

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JeffreyRStevens/flashr/main/man/figures/logo.png){.absolute top="-40" right="50" height="230"}

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/furrer-lab/abn/refs/heads/main/inst/figures/logo.png){.absolute right="-120" top="100"  height="230"}
 
# Today...

![](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExY3JzbnBsOGNmcHI2aHJ1MTdlbnlvaGIxYnk3MjY2dmpsbjYxYjI0MSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Z54VPIMUNTnyg/giphy.gif)

## [[NCAA]{.ncaa} [tournament]{.ncaa2} {{< iconify mdi:bracket style="color:#ffffff;" >}}[brackets]{.ncaa2}{{< iconify mdi:bracket style="color:#ffffff;" flip="horizontal" >}}{{< iconify emojione:basketball >}}](https://github.com/alexkaechele/MMBracketR/blob/master/R/plotTourn.R) {background-image="https://library.sportingnews.com/styles/crop_style_16_9_desktop_webp/s3/2025-03/March%20Madness%20bracket%201.jpg.webp?itok=A5D7hrbC"}

::: {.absolute style="top: 210px; right: -120px; width: 500px;" .tilt2}
<a href="https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/bracketeer/versions/0.1.1">
  <img src="https://s.yimg.com/ny/api/res/1.2/gPt64CURyRsLcCJct6U.mA--/YXBwaWQ9aGlnaGxhbmRlcjt3PTY0MDtoPTQ5NDtjZj13ZWJw/https://media.zenfs.com/en/ny_post_sports_articles_389/d3f8a851af99417a9d83b14632aeb65e">
</a>
:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 210px; left: -120px; width: 500px;" .tilt}
<a href="https://github.com/zachmayer/kaggleNCAA">
  <img src="https://library.sportingnews.com/styles/crop_style_4_3_desktop_webp/s3/2026-03/Men%27s%20Printable%20March%20Madness%20Bracket%20%282026%29.jpg.webp">
</a>
:::

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering:
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
sessionInfo()
```
